stratagem:accelerated-scans.effect: в начале первой боевой раунда один CORPUSCARY INFANTRY юнит может совершить Normal Move на D6'. (CP1)
stratagem:accelerated-scans.name: Accelerated Scans

stratagem:acquisition-radius.effect: в начале вашей Command Phase один SKITARII INFANTRY юнит в 24' от вражеского objective marker считается контролирующим этот маркер. (CP1)
stratagem:acquisition-radius.name: Acquisition Radius

stratagem:armoured-advance.effect: до конца фазы один ERADICATION VEHICLE юнит получает -1 к урону от всех атак (минимально 1), но не может стрелять Pistol. (CP1)
stratagem:armoured-advance.name: Armoured Advance

stratagem:armoured-duellists.effect: Target: One Orks Vehicle unit that has not been selected to shoot. Until end of phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, +1 to Hit and +1 to Wound
stratagem:armoured-duellists.name: Armoured Duellists

stratagem:atomic-hardening.effect: до вашей следующей Command Phase один RAD-ZONE CORPS юнит получает -1 к урону от всех атак (минимально 1). (CP1)
stratagem:atomic-hardening.name: Atomic Hardening

stratagem:automated-defences.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один KASTELAN ROBOTS юнит получает [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. (CP1)
stratagem:automated-defences.name: Automated Defences

stratagem:bash-and-grab.effect: Target: One Orks unit not selected to fight. Until end of phase, each time a model makes an attack targeting a unit within range of loot objective, re-roll Wound roll
stratagem:bash-and-grab.name: Bash and Grab

stratagem:battleline-recalibration.effect: в начале любой фазы один SKITARII BATTLELINE юнит может совершить Normal Move на D6' в любую фазу (но не в фазе, в которой уже двигался). (CP1)
stratagem:battleline-recalibration.name: Battleline Recalibration

stratagem:big-killin-time.effect: WALKER получает +1 к wound до конца фазы
stratagem:big-killin-time.name: Big Killin' Time

stratagem:boardin-rush.effect: Target: One Orks unit not selected to move. Until end of phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, +6" Move
stratagem:boardin-rush.name: Boardin' Rush

stratagem:calculated-aggression.effect: в вашей Fight Phase один ERADICATION юнит получает +1 AP в ближнем бою. (CP1)
stratagem:calculated-aggression.name: Calculated Aggression

stratagem:call-dat-dakka.effect: Target: One Orks unit that had one or more models destroyed by those attacks. Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit
stratagem:call-dat-dakka.name: Call Dat Dakka?
stratagem:call-dat-dakka.when: Opponent's Shooting phase, just after enemy has shot

stratagem:canticle-of-the-hearth.effect: в вашей Command Phase один DATA-PSALM CONCLAVE INFANTRY юнит восстанавливает D3 ран. (CP1)
stratagem:canticle-of-the-hearth.name: Canticle of the Hearth

stratagem:careen.effect: когда VEHICLE орков уничтожен, может двигаться D6' и наносить D3 mortals
stratagem:careen.name: Careen!

stratagem:chant-of-the-remorseless-fist.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один DATA-PSALM CONCLAVE юнит получает [LETHAL HITS]. (CP1)
stratagem:chant-of-the-remorseless-fist.name: Chant of the Remorseless Fist

stratagem:contaminated-ruination.effect: выберите один objective marker в 12' от дружественного RAD-ZONE CORPS CHARACTER. Вражеские юниты на нём не могут восстанавливать раны до начала вашей следующей Command Phase. (CP1)
stratagem:contaminated-ruination.name: Contaminated Ruination

stratagem:controlled-fire.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один ERADICATION юнит получает [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (или [SUSTAINED HITS 2] если цель — MONSTER или VEHICLE). (CP1)
stratagem:controlled-fire.name: Controlled Fire

stratagem:crushing-advance.effect: в вашей Charge Phase один KASTELAN ROBOTS юнит может перебрасывать Charge. (CP1)
stratagem:crushing-advance.name: Crushing Advance

stratagem:data-ward.effect: до начала вашей следующей Command Phase один KASTELAN ROBOTS юнит получает -1 к урону от всех атак (минимально 1). (CP1)
stratagem:data-ward.name: Data-ward

stratagem:dats-ours.effect: Target: One Orks unit within Engagement Range of enemy units. Until start of next Command phase, +1 OC
stratagem:dats-ours.name: Dat's Ours

stratagem:deck-fraggers.effect: Target: One Orks unit not selected to shoot. Until end of phase, each time a model targets an Infantry unit with a ranged weapon, that weapon has [BLAST]
stratagem:deck-fraggers.name: Deck Fraggers

stratagem:ded-sneaky.effect: Target: One Kommandos or Stormboyz unit not within Engagement Range. Remove unit from battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves
stratagem:ded-sneaky.name: Ded Sneaky

stratagem:divine-augury.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один EXPLORATOR юнит получает [IGNORES COVER]. (CP1)
stratagem:divine-augury.name: Divine Augury

stratagem:doxology-of-ruin.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один DATA-PSALM CONCLAVE юнит может атаковать выбранное вражеское оружие: до конца фазы оно получает [HAZARDOUS] и +1 S. (CP1)
stratagem:doxology-of-ruin.name: Doxology of Ruin

stratagem:empathic-sight.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один CORPUSCARY юнит получает +1 to Hit против ближайшей вражеской цели. (CP1)
stratagem:empathic-sight.name: Empathic Sight

stratagem:execute-and-purge.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase, после уничтожения вражеского юнита огнём, один ERADICATION юнит может совершить Normal Move на D6'. (CP1)
stratagem:execute-and-purge.name: Execute and Purge

stratagem:feasting-on-fear.effect: If one or more enemy models were destroyed by that unit's melee attacks this phase, that unit can fight again.
stratagem:feasting-on-fear.name: Feasting on Fear
stratagem:feasting-on-fear.when: Fight phase, just after a friendly Kroot unit has fought

stratagem:fervent-incantation.effect: один CORPUSCARY юнит, уничтоженный вражеской атакой, может до момента удаления совершить атаку, как если бы он был в своей Shooting Phase. (CP1)
stratagem:fervent-incantation.name: Fervent Incantation

stratagem:fight-proppa.effect: Target: One Orks Infantry or Mounted unit not selected to fight. Select [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] for melee weapons until end of phase
stratagem:fight-proppa.name: Fight Proppa

stratagem:get-stuck-in-ladz.effect: Target: One Orks unit (excluding Gretchin). Until start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your unit, even if you have already called a Waaagh! this battle
stratagem:get-stuck-in-ladz.name: Get Stuck In, Ladz!

stratagem:grab-and-bash.effect: Target: One Orks unit (excluding Gretchin) within range of loot objective. Until start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your unit, even if you have already called a Waaagh!
stratagem:grab-and-bash.name: Grab and Bash

stratagem:hidden-hunter.effect: Kroot не могут быть целью стрельбы >18'
stratagem:hidden-hunter.name: Hidden Hunter

stratagem:huge-show-offs.effect: Target: One Orks Walker unit (excluding Killa Kans). Until start of your next Command phase, improve M, LD and OC by 1, and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, +1 to Hit
stratagem:huge-show-offs.name: Huge Show-Offs

stratagem:hunters-instincts.effect: в вашей Fight Phase один SKITARII INFANTRY юнит, получивший чардж, может атаковать первым, даже если не имеет First Strike. (CP1)
stratagem:hunters-instincts.name: Hunter's Instincts

stratagem:hymn-of-the-ferrous-ward.effect: до вашей следующей Command Phase один DATA-PSALM CONCLAVE юнит получает 4+ invulnerable save против ranged-атак. (CP1)
stratagem:hymn-of-the-ferrous-ward.name: Hymn of the Ferrous Ward

stratagem:impervious.effect: Target: One Battlewagon, Kill Rig or Hunta Rig selected as target. Until end of phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if S > T, subtract 1 from the Wound roll
stratagem:impervious.name: Impervious
stratagem:impervious.when: Opponent's Shooting phase, just after enemy selects targets

stratagem:irradiated-munitions.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один дружественный RAD-ZONE CORPS юнит получает [LETHAL HITS] для всех ranged-атак до конца фазы. (CP1)
stratagem:irradiated-munitions.name: Irradiated Munitions

stratagem:just-a-scratch.effect: восстанавливает D3 ран дружественному ORKS VEHICLE
stratagem:just-a-scratch.name: Just A Scratch

stratagem:kannon-fodder.effect: infantry в 6" может прикрывать WALKER (look out, sir)
stratagem:kannon-fodder.name: Kannon Fodder

stratagem:krump-and-run.effect: Target: One Orks unit that was within Engagement Range of that enemy at start of phase and is not within range of enemy units. Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6"
stratagem:krump-and-run.name: Krump and Run
stratagem:krump-and-run.when: Opponent's Movement phase, just after enemy Falls Back

stratagem:krunchn-descent.effect: Target: That Stormboyz unit. Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range, roll 1 D6 per model in Engagement Range: each 4+ = 1 mortal wound (max 6)
stratagem:krunchn-descent.name: Krunchn' Descent
stratagem:krunchn-descent.when: Your Charge phase, just after a Stormboyz unit ends a Charge move

stratagem:litany-of-the-electromancer.effect: когда вражеский юнит совершает Charge против DATA-PSALM CONCLAVE юнита, нападающий получает -1 to Hit в ближнем бою до конца фазы. (CP1)
stratagem:litany-of-the-electromancer.name: Litany of the Electromancer

stratagem:lob-on-in.effect: один WALKER может высадиться с Deep Strike
stratagem:lob-on-in.name: Lob On In

stratagem:long-uncontrolled-bursts.effect: Target: One Orks unit not selected to shoot. Until end of phase, ranged weapons have the [IGNORES COVER] ability
stratagem:long-uncontrolled-bursts.name: Long, Uncontrolled Bursts

stratagem:lurking-in-the-shadows.effect: Select one friendly Kroot unit that was selected as the target of an attack. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit would lose a wound as the result of a ranged attack, on a 5+ that wound is not lost.
stratagem:lurking-in-the-shadows.name: Lurking in the Shadows

stratagem:marked-prior-target.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase выберите одну вражескую единицу в 24' от EXPLORATOR CHARACTER — дружественные EXPLORATOR юниты получают +1 to Hit против неё. (CP1)
stratagem:marked-prior-target.name: Marked Prior Target

stratagem:marksmans-focus.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один ERADICATION INFANTRY юнит может игнорировать штраф за Heavy при стрельбе после Advance. (CP1)
stratagem:marksmans-focus.name: Marksman's Focus

stratagem:mekanised-brutality.effect: Target: One Battlewagon, Kill Rig or Hunta Rig that has not been selected to move. Until end of turn, each time a unit disembarks from your unit after it makes a Normal move, that disembarked unit is still eligible to declare a charge
stratagem:mekanised-brutality.name: Mekanised Brutality

stratagem:mount-up-ladz.effect: Target: One Orks Infantry unit not within Engagement Range, and one friendly Transport it can embark within. If your Orks Infantry unit is wholly within 6" of that Transport, it can embark within it
stratagem:mount-up-ladz.name: Mount Up, Ladz

stratagem:neural-override.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один CORPUSCARY юнит может игнорировать штрафы к попаданию за Heavy и Assault. (CP1)
stratagem:neural-override.name: Neural Override

stratagem:on-to-da-next.effect: Target: One Orks unit that was within Engagement Range of that enemy at start of phase. Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6"
stratagem:on-to-da-next.name: On to da Next
stratagem:on-to-da-next.when: Opponent's Movement phase, just after enemy Falls Back

stratagem:orks-is-still-orks.effect: Target: One Orks unit not selected to fight. Until end of phase, re-roll Wound roll of 1. If target is within range of an objective marker, re-roll the Wound roll instead
stratagem:orks-is-still-orks.name: Orks Is Still Orks

stratagem:override-sentinels.effect: в начале вашей Command Phase один KASTELAN ROBOTS юнит может игнорировать штрафы к Move за Difficult Terrain до вашей следующей Command Phase. (CP1)
stratagem:override-sentinels.name: Override Sentinels

stratagem:pack-hunters.effect: Select one friendly Kroot unit that has not yet been selected to shoot or fight this phase. Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee and ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.
stratagem:pack-hunters.name: Pack Hunters
stratagem:pack-hunters.when: Your Shooting phase or Fight phase

stratagem:photon-grenades.effect: -1 to hit врагам в зоне поражения
stratagem:photon-grenades.name: Photon Grenades

stratagem:precision-overwatch.effect: в любой фазе, когда вражеский юнит совершает Charge, один ERADICATION юнит может выполнить Overwatch, стреляя на 5+. (CP1)
stratagem:precision-overwatch.name: Precision Overwatch

stratagem:predictive-logic.effect: в любой фазе, когда вражеский юнит совершает Charge против EXPLORATOR INFANTRY, этот юнит может совершить Overwatch на 5+. (CP1)
stratagem:predictive-logic.name: Predictive Logic

stratagem:psalm-of-the-clear-sight.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один DATA-PSALM CONCLAVE юнит получает +1 to Hit против целей на 12' и ближе. (CP1)
stratagem:psalm-of-the-clear-sight.name: Psalm of the Clear Sight

stratagem:rad-saturation.effect: до конца фазы дружественный RAD-ZONE CORPS INFANTRY юнит получает Feel No Pain 5+ против атак из огнестрельного оружия. (CP1)
stratagem:rad-saturation.name: Rad-saturation

stratagem:rapid-regroup.effect: Select one friendly Kroot unit that is Battle-shocked. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.
stratagem:rapid-regroup.name: Rapid Regroup

stratagem:reactive-circuits.effect: когда вражеский юнит заканчивает Normal/Advance/Charge Move в 9' от CORPUSCARY INFANTRY, этот юнит может совершить Normal Move на D6'. (CP1)
stratagem:reactive-circuits.name: Reactive Circuits

stratagem:reactive-reprogramming.effect: в любой фазе, когда KASTELAN ROBOTS юнит получает урон от ranged-атаки, вы можете дать ему +1 к Save до конца фазы. (CP1)
stratagem:reactive-reprogramming.name: Reactive Reprogramming

stratagem:reclaim-resources.effect: в конце вашей Command Phase один EXPLORATOR INFANTRY юнит на objective marker восстанавливает D3 ран. (CP1)
stratagem:reclaim-resources.name: Reclaim Resources

stratagem:rolling-loot-heap.effect: Target: One Flash Gitz unit not selected to shoot. Until end of phase, ranged weapons have [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+]
stratagem:rolling-loot-heap.name: Rolling Loot-Heap

stratagem:run-em-down.effect: Target: One Battlewagon, Kill Rig or Hunta Rig that has not been selected to move. Select up to two other friendly Orks Vehicle or Orks Monster units within 6". Until end of turn, your unit and selected units are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced
stratagem:run-em-down.name: Run 'Em Down

stratagem:salvage-protocols.effect: когда EXPLORATOR VEHICLE уничтожен, выберите один дружественный EXPLORATOR INFANTRY юнит в 6' — он восстанавливает D3 ран. (CP1)
stratagem:salvage-protocols.name: Salvage Protocols

stratagem:servo-skull-cloud.effect: до вашей следующей Command Phase один EXPLORATOR юнит не может быть целью ranged-атак дальше 18'. (CP1)
stratagem:servo-skull-cloud.name: Servo-skull Cloud

stratagem:shroud-protocol.effect: до начала вашей следующей Command Phase один SKITARII INFANTRY юнит получает -1 к попаданию по нему ranged-атаками. (CP1)
stratagem:shroud-protocol.name: Shroud Protocol

stratagem:soul-scouring-irradiation.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один дружественный RAD-ZONE CORPS юнит атакует с +1 AP против целей, которые уже находятся под эффектом Rad-bombardment. (CP1)
stratagem:soul-scouring-irradiation.name: Soul-scouring Irradiation

stratagem:speshul-shells.effect: Target: One Orks unit not selected to shoot. Until end of phase, each time a model makes a ranged attack targeting the closest eligible target within 18", improve AP by 1
stratagem:speshul-shells.name: Speshul Shells

stratagem:suppressing-fire.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один дружественный SKITARII юнит может атаковать с [IGNORES COVER] до конца фазы. (CP1)
stratagem:suppressing-fire.name: Suppressing Fire

stratagem:taktikal-retreat.effect: Target: That Orks unit. Until end of turn, unit eligible to shoot and declare charge in a turn it Fell Back
stratagem:taktikal-retreat.name: Taktikal Retreat
stratagem:taktikal-retreat.when: Your Movement phase, just after an Orks unit Falls Back

stratagem:tectonic-stomp.effect: в вашей Fight Phase один KASTELAN ROBOTS юнит атакует с +1 AP в ближнем бою. (CP1)
stratagem:tectonic-stomp.name: Tectonic Stomp

stratagem:toxic-transference.effect: когда дружественный RAD-ZONE CORPS юнит уничтожен вражеским юнитом в ближнем бою, этот вражеский юнит получает -1 WS до конца фазы. (CP1)
stratagem:toxic-transference.name: Toxic Transference

stratagem:transsonic-blades.effect: в вашей Fight Phase один CORPUSCARY юнит атакует с +1 AP в ближнем бою. (CP1)
stratagem:transsonic-blades.name: Transsonic Blades

stratagem:unbound-ferocity.effect: Select one friendly Kroot unit that declared a charge this phase. That unit can declare a charge even if it Advanced this turn.
stratagem:unbound-ferocity.name: Unbound Ferocity

stratagem:unbridled-carnage.effect: отряд получает +1 to Wound в ближнем бою
stratagem:unbridled-carnage.name: Unbridled Carnage

stratagem:wrathful-fusillade.effect: в вашей Shooting Phase один SKITARII юнит может перебрасывать 1 to Wound. (CP1)
stratagem:wrathful-fusillade.name: Wrathful Fusillade

stratagem:yooz-in-trouble-now.effect: Target: One Battlewagon, Hunta Rig or Kill Rig hit by the attacking unit's attacks. One Orks Infantry unit embarked within can disembark and make a Surge move (D6"), ending as close as possible to closest enemy unit, can move within Engagement Range
stratagem:yooz-in-trouble-now.name: Yooz in Trouble Now
stratagem:yooz-in-trouble-now.when: Opponent's Shooting phase, just after enemy has shot
